stemHtml: On a runway of 1800 m or more with centreline lights, the last 900 m segment has these colours:

options.a: Alternating red/white from 900 to 300 m, then red from 300 m to the end.
options.b: Red from 900 to 300 m, then white to the end.
options.c: White from 900 to 300 m, then alternating red/white to the end.
options.d: Alternating red/white from 900 to 300 m, then white to the end.
